domain.name: travel
domain.description: Travel planning tasks such as multi-day city itineraries and schedules.

task.name: toronto_6day_trip
task.title: 6-Day Toronto Trip Plan
task.description: A suggested 6-day itinerary for Toronto with daily themes, attractions, restaurants, and practical notes.

task_schema.name: itinerary_cs1
task_schema.description: Travel itinerary with ordered days containing attractions, dining, and notes.
task_schema.hierarchy:
Itinerary (root)
    `-- Day (container, indexed by @index)
        |-- Attraction (leaf)
        |-- Restaurant (leaf)
        `-- Note (leaf)
task_schema.syntax_rules:
- Paths start with /Itinerary
- Node types: Itinerary, Day, Attraction, Restaurant, Note
- Indices: Node[1], Node[-1], Node[1:3]
- Logical: AND / OR / not() combine predicates WITHIN brackets

domain_schema.name: travel_domain
domain_schema.description: Domain container for travel tasks with versions
domain_schema.hierarchy:
Travel_Root (root)
  `-- Task (container, indexed by @name)
      `-- TaskVersion (version, indexed by @number)

memory_xml:
<?xml version='1.0' encoding='utf-8'?>
<Root><Itinerary_Version number="1"><patch_info>cold start initialization</patch_info><conversation_history>I want 6 days travel plan in Toronto</conversation_history><Itinerary><title>6-Day Toronto Trip</title><summary>A balanced 6-day plan covering major attractions, neighbourhoods, food suggestions, and practical notes for transit and timings.</summary><Day index="1"><date>Day 1</date><theme>Arrival & Downtown Highlights</theme><overview>Arrive, settle in, and explore downtown landmarks around the waterfront and CN Tower.</overview><Attraction><name>CN Tower</name><time_block>Late afternoon</time_block><description>Iconic tower with city views and glass-floor experience.</description><highlights><highlight>EdgeWalk (optional)</highlight><highlight>360 Restaurant views</highlight><highlight>Glass floor</highlight></highlights></Attraction><Attraction><name>Harbourfront</name><time_block>Evening</time_block><description>Stroll along the waterfront, public art, and lakeside paths.</description><highlights><highlight>Waterfront Boardwalk</highlight><highlight>Seasonal events</highlight><highlight>Boat tours</highlight></highlights></Attraction><Restaurant><name>Brooklyn Warehouse (or similar casual spot)</name><time_block>Dinner</time_block><cuisine>Contemporary / Canadian</cuisine><description>Casual dinner near the waterfront with local beers and comfort food.</description><highlights><highlight>Relaxed vibe</highlight><highlight>Good for groups</highlight></highlights></Restaurant><Note><title>Transit from Airport</title><description>Consider UP Express from Pearson to Union Station (~25 min) or taxis/ride-share depending on luggage.</description><tags><tag>arrival</tag><tag>transit</tag></tags></Note></Day><Day index="2"><date>Day 2</date><theme>Museums & Culture</theme><overview>Visit major museums and nearby Kensington Market for eclectic shopping and food.</overview><Attraction><name>Royal Ontario Museum (ROM)</name><time_block>Morning</time_block><description>Extensive natural history and world culture exhibits.</description><highlights><highlight>Fossils & dinosaurs</highlight><highlight>Special exhibitions</highlight></highlights></Attraction><Attraction><name>Art Gallery of Ontario (AGO)</name><time_block>Afternoon</time_block><description>Large collection of Canadian and international art; building by Gehry.</description><highlights><highlight>Group of Seven</highlight><highlight>Contemporary collections</highlight></highlights></Attraction><Restaurant><name>Kensington Market food stalls</name><time_block>Late afternoon</time_block><cuisine>Various / Street food</cuisine><description>Try tacos, pastries, and international bites while strolling the market.</description><highlights><highlight>Eclectic eats</highlight><highlight>Vintage shops</highlight></highlights></Restaurant></Day><Day index="3"><date>Day 3</date><theme>Historic Distillery & Harbour Islands</theme><overview>Historic Distillery District in the morning, then ferry to Toronto Islands for outdoor time.</overview><Attraction><name>Distillery District</name><time_block>Morning</time_block><description>Cobblestone streets, galleries, boutiques, and cafes in restored industrial buildings.</description><highlights><highlight>Artisan shops</highlight><highlight>Historic architecture</highlight></highlights></Attraction><Attraction><name>Toronto Islands</name><time_block>Afternoon</time_block><description>Ferry ride to islands for beaches, bike rentals, and skyline views.</description><highlights><highlight>Centre Island beach</highlight><highlight>Bike paths</highlight><highlight>Ample photo spots of skyline</highlight></highlights></Attraction><Restaurant><name>El Catrin (Distillery)</name><time_block>Dinner</time_block><cuisine>Mexican</cuisine><description>Vibrant Mexican restaurant in the Distillery with patio options.</description><highlights><highlight>Large margaritas</highlight><highlight>Stylish interior</highlight></highlights></Restaurant></Day><Day index="4"><date>Day 4</date><theme>Neighbourhood Exploration: Queen West & Trinity Bellwoods</theme><overview>Trendier neighbourhoods with shops, cafes, street art, and park time.</overview><Attraction><name>Queen Street West</name><time_block>Morning to afternoon</time_block><description>Boutiques, galleries, and street art; great for shopping and people-watching.</description><highlights><highlight>Independent stores</highlight><highlight>Street murals</highlight></highlights></Attraction><Attraction><name>Trinity Bellwoods Park</name><time_block>Afternoon</time_block><description>Popular park for relaxing, picnics, and local scene.</description><highlights><highlight>Picnic spots</highlight><highlight>Weekend markets (seasonal)</highlight></highlights></Attraction><Restaurant><name>Local cafe or brunch spot</name><time_block>Brunch</time_block><cuisine>Brunch / Cafe</cuisine><description>Enjoy a relaxed brunch at a neighbourhood cafe; try Canadian staples like eggs benny.</description><highlights><highlight>Cozy atmosphere</highlight><highlight>Good coffee</highlight></highlights></Restaurant><Note><title>Evening Options</title><description>Check local listings for live music or catch a theatre show on King Street.</description><tags><tag>entertainment</tag><tag>evening</tag></tags></Note></Day><Day index="5"><date>Day 5</date><theme>Nature & Food Markets</theme><overview>Royal Botanical Gardens or High Park in the morning, followed by St. Lawrence Market and food exploring.</overview><Attraction><name>High Park or Toronto Botanical Spots</name><time_block>Morning</time_block><description>Seasonal blossoms, walking trails, and a small zoo in High Park.</description><highlights><highlight>Cherry blossoms (seasonal)</highlight><highlight>Walking trails</highlight></highlights></Attraction><Attraction><name>St. Lawrence Market</name><time_block>Afternoon</time_block><description>Historic market with vendors selling local produce, cheeses, and prepared foods.</description><highlights><highlight>Peameal bacon sandwich</highlight><highlight>Specialty food stalls</highlight></highlights></Attraction><Restaurant><name>Market food vendors or nearby bistro</name><time_block>Lunch</time_block><cuisine>Market / International</cuisine><description>Sample multiple small bites from vendors; ideal for food-focused travelers.</description><highlights><highlight>Variety of choices</highlight><highlight>Local specialties</highlight></highlights></Restaurant></Day><Day index="6"><date>Day 6</date><theme>Flexible/Departure Day</theme><overview>Wrap up, last-minute shopping or revisit favourites, and prepare for departure.</overview><Attraction><name>Yorkville or Shopping District</name><time_block>Morning</time_block><description>Upscale shops, galleries, and easy cafes for a relaxed last morning.</description><highlights><highlight>Souvenir shopping</highlight><highlight>Art galleries</highlight></highlights></Attraction><Note><title>Airport Transfer & Timing</title><description>Allow time for transit to the airport; UP Express from Union Station is fast. Confirm flight time and check-in windows.</description><tags><tag>departure</tag><tag>transit</tag><tag>logistics</tag></tags></Note><Restaurant><name>Brunch or quick cafe near hotel</name><time_block>Before departure</time_block><cuisine>Cafe / Brunch</cuisine><description>Grab a final coffee and light meal before checking out.</description><highlights><highlight>Quick service</highlight><highlight>Easy to reach transit</highlight></highlights></Restaurant></Day></Itinerary></Itinerary_Version></Root>

display.domain_schema:
name: travel_domain
description: Domain container for travel tasks with versions
hierarchy: "Travel_Root (root)\n  `-- Task (container, indexed by @name)\n      `--\
  \ TaskVersion (version, indexed by @number)"
nodes:
  Travel_Root:
    type: root
    fields: []
    children:
    - Task
  Task:
    type: container
    index_attr: name
    fields:
    - title
    - description
    - status
    children:
    - TaskVersion
  TaskVersion:
    type: version
    index_attr: number
    fields:
    - patch_info
    - conversation_history
    - created_at
    children: []
display.task_schema:
name: itinerary_cs1
description: Travel itinerary with ordered days containing attractions, dining, and
  notes.
hierarchy: "Itinerary (root)\n    `-- Day (container, indexed by @index)\n       \
  \ |-- Attraction (leaf)\n        |-- Restaurant (leaf)\n        `-- Note (leaf)"
nodes:
  Itinerary:
    type: root
    fields:
    - title
    - summary
    children:
    - Day
  Day:
    type: container
    fields:
    - date
    - theme
    - overview
    children:
    - Attraction
    - Restaurant
    - Note
    index_attr: index
  Attraction:
    type: leaf
    fields:
    - name
    - time_block
    - description
    - highlights
    children: []
  Restaurant:
    type: leaf
    fields:
    - name
    - time_block
    - cuisine
    - description
    - highlights
    children: []
  Note:
    type: leaf
    fields:
    - title
    - description
    - tags
    children: []
data_files:
  toronto_6day_trip: memory/travel/toronto_6day_trip.xml
default_data: toronto_6day_trip
examples_file: prompts/query_generator/domains/xpath_examples_itinerary_cs1.txt
syntax_rules: '- Paths start with /Itinerary

  - Node types: Itinerary, Day, Attraction, Restaurant, Note

  - Indices: Node[1], Node[-1], Node[1:3]

  - Logical: AND / OR / not() combine predicates WITHIN brackets'
display.memory_xml:
<?xml version="1.0" ?>
<Root>
  <Itinerary_Version number="1">
    <patch_info>cold start initialization</patch_info>
    <conversation_history>I want 6 days travel plan in Toronto</conversation_history>
    <Itinerary>
      <title>6-Day Toronto Trip</title>
      <summary>A balanced 6-day plan covering major attractions, neighbourhoods, food suggestions, and practical notes for transit and timings.</summary>
      <Day index="1">
        <date>Day 1</date>
        <theme>Arrival & Downtown Highlights</theme>
        <overview>Arrive, settle in, and explore downtown landmarks around the waterfront and CN Tower.</overview>
        <Attraction>
          <name>CN Tower</name>
          <time_block>Late afternoon</time_block>
          <description>Iconic tower with city views and glass-floor experience.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>EdgeWalk (optional)</highlight>
            <highlight>360 Restaurant views</highlight>
            <highlight>Glass floor</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Attraction>
        <Attraction>
          <name>Harbourfront</name>
          <time_block>Evening</time_block>
          <description>Stroll along the waterfront, public art, and lakeside paths.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Waterfront Boardwalk</highlight>
            <highlight>Seasonal events</highlight>
            <highlight>Boat tours</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Attraction>
        <Restaurant>
          <name>Brooklyn Warehouse (or similar casual spot)</name>
          <time_block>Dinner</time_block>
          <cuisine>Contemporary / Canadian</cuisine>
          <description>Casual dinner near the waterfront with local beers and comfort food.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Relaxed vibe</highlight>
            <highlight>Good for groups</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Restaurant>
        <Note>
          <title>Transit from Airport</title>
          <description>Consider UP Express from Pearson to Union Station (~25 min) or taxis/ride-share depending on luggage.</description>
          <tags>
            <tag>arrival</tag>
            <tag>transit</tag>
          </tags>
        </Note>
      </Day>
      <Day index="2">
        <date>Day 2</date>
        <theme>Museums & Culture</theme>
        <overview>Visit major museums and nearby Kensington Market for eclectic shopping and food.</overview>
        <Attraction>
          <name>Royal Ontario Museum (ROM)</name>
          <time_block>Morning</time_block>
          <description>Extensive natural history and world culture exhibits.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Fossils & dinosaurs</highlight>
            <highlight>Special exhibitions</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Attraction>
        <Attraction>
          <name>Art Gallery of Ontario (AGO)</name>
          <time_block>Afternoon</time_block>
          <description>Large collection of Canadian and international art; building by Gehry.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Group of Seven</highlight>
            <highlight>Contemporary collections</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Attraction>
        <Restaurant>
          <name>Kensington Market food stalls</name>
          <time_block>Late afternoon</time_block>
          <cuisine>Various / Street food</cuisine>
          <description>Try tacos, pastries, and international bites while strolling the market.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Eclectic eats</highlight>
            <highlight>Vintage shops</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Restaurant>
      </Day>
      <Day index="3">
        <date>Day 3</date>
        <theme>Historic Distillery & Harbour Islands</theme>
        <overview>Historic Distillery District in the morning, then ferry to Toronto Islands for outdoor time.</overview>
        <Attraction>
          <name>Distillery District</name>
          <time_block>Morning</time_block>
          <description>Cobblestone streets, galleries, boutiques, and cafes in restored industrial buildings.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Artisan shops</highlight>
            <highlight>Historic architecture</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Attraction>
        <Attraction>
          <name>Toronto Islands</name>
          <time_block>Afternoon</time_block>
          <description>Ferry ride to islands for beaches, bike rentals, and skyline views.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Centre Island beach</highlight>
            <highlight>Bike paths</highlight>
            <highlight>Ample photo spots of skyline</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Attraction>
        <Restaurant>
          <name>El Catrin (Distillery)</name>
          <time_block>Dinner</time_block>
          <cuisine>Mexican</cuisine>
          <description>Vibrant Mexican restaurant in the Distillery with patio options.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Large margaritas</highlight>
            <highlight>Stylish interior</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Restaurant>
      </Day>
      <Day index="4">
        <date>Day 4</date>
        <theme>Neighbourhood Exploration: Queen West & Trinity Bellwoods</theme>
        <overview>Trendier neighbourhoods with shops, cafes, street art, and park time.</overview>
        <Attraction>
          <name>Queen Street West</name>
          <time_block>Morning to afternoon</time_block>
          <description>Boutiques, galleries, and street art; great for shopping and people-watching.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Independent stores</highlight>
            <highlight>Street murals</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Attraction>
        <Attraction>
          <name>Trinity Bellwoods Park</name>
          <time_block>Afternoon</time_block>
          <description>Popular park for relaxing, picnics, and local scene.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Picnic spots</highlight>
            <highlight>Weekend markets (seasonal)</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Attraction>
        <Restaurant>
          <name>Local cafe or brunch spot</name>
          <time_block>Brunch</time_block>
          <cuisine>Brunch / Cafe</cuisine>
          <description>Enjoy a relaxed brunch at a neighbourhood cafe; try Canadian staples like eggs benny.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Cozy atmosphere</highlight>
            <highlight>Good coffee</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Restaurant>
        <Note>
          <title>Evening Options</title>
          <description>Check local listings for live music or catch a theatre show on King Street.</description>
          <tags>
            <tag>entertainment</tag>
            <tag>evening</tag>
          </tags>
        </Note>
      </Day>
      <Day index="5">
        <date>Day 5</date>
        <theme>Nature & Food Markets</theme>
        <overview>Royal Botanical Gardens or High Park in the morning, followed by St. Lawrence Market and food exploring.</overview>
        <Attraction>
          <name>High Park or Toronto Botanical Spots</name>
          <time_block>Morning</time_block>
          <description>Seasonal blossoms, walking trails, and a small zoo in High Park.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Cherry blossoms (seasonal)</highlight>
            <highlight>Walking trails</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Attraction>
        <Attraction>
          <name>St. Lawrence Market</name>
          <time_block>Afternoon</time_block>
          <description>Historic market with vendors selling local produce, cheeses, and prepared foods.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Peameal bacon sandwich</highlight>
            <highlight>Specialty food stalls</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Attraction>
        <Restaurant>
          <name>Market food vendors or nearby bistro</name>
          <time_block>Lunch</time_block>
          <cuisine>Market / International</cuisine>
          <description>Sample multiple small bites from vendors; ideal for food-focused travelers.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Variety of choices</highlight>
            <highlight>Local specialties</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Restaurant>
      </Day>
      <Day index="6">
        <date>Day 6</date>
        <theme>Flexible/Departure Day</theme>
        <overview>Wrap up, last-minute shopping or revisit favourites, and prepare for departure.</overview>
        <Attraction>
          <name>Yorkville or Shopping District</name>
          <time_block>Morning</time_block>
          <description>Upscale shops, galleries, and easy cafes for a relaxed last morning.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Souvenir shopping</highlight>
            <highlight>Art galleries</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Attraction>
        <Note>
          <title>Airport Transfer & Timing</title>
          <description>Allow time for transit to the airport; UP Express from Union Station is fast. Confirm flight time and check-in windows.</description>
          <tags>
            <tag>departure</tag>
            <tag>transit</tag>
            <tag>logistics</tag>
          </tags>
        </Note>
        <Restaurant>
          <name>Brunch or quick cafe near hotel</name>
          <time_block>Before departure</time_block>
          <cuisine>Cafe / Brunch</cuisine>
          <description>Grab a final coffee and light meal before checking out.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Quick service</highlight>
            <highlight>Easy to reach transit</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Restaurant>
      </Day>
    </Itinerary>
  </Itinerary_Version>
</Root>
